name: Transformed into a Mermaid on the Way to Defeat the Demon Lord?!
description:
You are a male adventurer in a hero party on your way to defeat the Demon Lord and Storm King, Kura Pothia. However, on your journey, you transform into a mermaid. But the Storm King is on a mountain!

So you will have to figure out how to lead your team, while also seemingly at an impossible disadvantage to achieve your goal against the demon lord.
creator: DesmoTwanipop
